name: Controlled Fire
omega_shift_description: Cooking, warmth, light — first energy transformation beyond muscle

name: Stone Tools (Acheulean)
omega_shift_description: Precision manufacturing, hunting efficiency

name: Symbolic Language
omega_shift_description: Knowledge transfer across time and space

name: Neolithic Agriculture
omega_shift_description: Controlled food supply — enables sedentary civilization

name: Animal Husbandry
omega_shift_description: Draft power, dairy, wool — systematic biomass energy

name: Bronze/Metallurgy Smelting
omega_shift_description: First synthetic materials; weapons, tools beyond stone

name: Mechanical Advantage (Wheel/Lever)
omega_shift_description: Amplifies force — enables construction, water management, transport

name: Writing & Record Keeping
omega_shift_description: External memory — enables complex administration and trade

name: Iron Smelting
omega_shift_description: Harder tools, cheaper than bronze; democratizes metalworking

name: Waterwheel
omega_shift_description: Continuous mechanical power from water flow

name: Mechanical Clock
omega_shift_description: Precise time measurement — enables coordination, scheduling, navigation, scientific observation

name: Gunpowder & Cannon (European)
omega_shift_description: Chemical energy release for propulsion — transforms warfare, mining, construction; enables new material extraction

name: Double-Entry Bookkeeping & Early Banking
omega_shift_description: Systematic financial accounting + credit creation — enables capital allocation, long-distance trade finance, risk distribution
source: Gülmez 2026 (Medici banking, Banca Monte dei Paschi 1472, Bills of exchange)

name: Printing Press (Gutenberg)
omega_shift_description: Mass reproduction of information — scientific revolution enabler

name: Three-Masted Sailing Ship
omega_shift_description: Transoceanic navigation — global trade and knowledge networks

name: Blast Furnace & Iron Casting
omega_shift_description: High-temperature iron production at scale — enables cheap structural materials, machine parts, weaponry

name: Crop Rotation & Scientific Agriculture
omega_shift_description: Systematic soil management — enables sustained agricultural surplus, population growth, labor release for industrialization

name: Steam Engine (Watt)
omega_shift_description: Portable, scalable mechanical power from fossil fuel

name: Factory System
omega_shift_description: Division of labor + machines = industrial production

name: Railways
omega_shift_description: Fast freight + passenger transport; integrates national markets

name: Telegraph (Long-distance communication)
omega_shift_description: Near-instantaneous long-distance communication — eliminates information lag in trade, military coordination, journalism

name: Steel Production (Bessemer)
omega_shift_description: Cheap, strong structural material for infrastructure at scale

name: Commercial Electricity
omega_shift_description: Clean, transmissible, flexible energy; electric motors

name: Internal Combustion Engine
omega_shift_description: Portable mobile power; automobile, aviation

name: Electronics/Vacuum Tube
omega_shift_description: Amplification and signal processing — radio, early computing

name: Mass Production (Ford)
omega_shift_description: Moving assembly line; consumer goods at population scale

name: Transistor/Semiconductor
omega_shift_description: Miniaturized switching; basis of all digital technology

name: Personal Computer (Intel 4004)
omega_shift_description: Programmable universal machine — information processing at scale

name: Internet/WWW
omega_shift_description: Global information network — eliminates distance in communication

name: Generative AI (Transformer)
omega_shift_description: Cognitive task automation — language, reasoning, generation
